title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING DROP IN CENTER MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services for children, youth, and adults, including mental health diagnosis and assessment, individual and group therapy, case management, screening and referrals to inpatient or residential services as needed, and community education. 1060 Webber Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-7pm, Saturday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 296-5452 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 296-5452 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. Some grant-supported services are provided at no cost. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River, Sherman, and Wasco Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Community Mental Health Agencies Group Counseling In Person Crisis Intervention Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Case Management Other Services Offered At This Location: REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTIONS SERVICES CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
